title: HULISEN Cookie Cutters Set (5 Pieces/Set), Stainless Steel Scone Cutters with Handles, Round Pastry Cutters Circle Biscuit Cutters Set for Baking, Professional Dough Cutter Tool.
features: High Grade Material: Made of stainless steel, look amazing and easy to clean, dishwasher safe, rust-proof. High quailty material making the cookie cutters strong so they keep their shape, long lasting and long-lasting

Thoughtful Design: This cookie cutters set are finished to the highest standard, are hand polished and design with handle. There are no sharp or dangerous edges, a plain clean edge on the bottom to cut hard and sticky dough with ease. Come with a ring which helps to keep the spoons together after a full day of baking or cooking

Arched Handle: Design with comfortable arched handle, easy to use and storage. The scone cutter of 5 different sizes, the diameters are 4, 5, 6, 7, 8 cm, 1 5/8, 2, 2 1/4, 2 3/4, 3 1/8 inch, meet your differents needs

Stylish Baking: This pastry cutter set is a must baking tools in your kitchen for creating beautiful cookies, precise fondant circles, perfect donuts, round sandwich, flaky biscuits, delicious crumpets, mini cakes, tarts and so on

Gift Wrapping: A good gift for housewarming, birthday. It is ultimately healthier for your child, your family and friends. Don't need more consideration, Click the "Add to Cart", your neighbor will ask you where we got it
